variations.compliment: Ishkaara looks like a wonderful brand - the freebies with every order are such a fun touch, and customers clearly love them - one review said the excitement of seeing what freebie you'd sent beat opening the actual order!
variations.email:
Hello Navya,

Thanks for checking out Polymer! Ishkaara looks like a wonderful brand - the freebies with every order are such a fun touch, and customers clearly love them - one review said the excitement of seeing what freebie you'd sent beat opening the actual order!

Happy to answer any questions you might have about Polymer.

Cheers,
Jessica
